checks.action: Keep vercel.json static-first with outputDirectory dist.
checks.detail: vercel.json uses npm run export:web, outputDirectory dist, static headers, and SPA fallback.
checks.label: Vercel static config

checks.action: Run npm run export:web && npm run web:pwa:check before deployment.
checks.detail: PWA readiness report is ready, including manifest, service worker, static assets, and no-backend checks.
checks.label: PWA readiness evidence

checks.action: Do not add api, pages/api, or functions until a paid backend path is explicitly selected.
checks.detail: No Vercel API routes, functions directory, or backend surface is present.
checks.label: No backend surface

checks.action: Keep VERCEL_TOKEN, VERCEL_ORG_ID, and VERCEL_PROJECT_ID documented with empty template values.
checks.detail: Vercel deployment key names are documented in .env.example with empty template values.
checks.label: Deployment env template

checks.action: Run vercel link or vercel pull on the target Vercel account when ready to deploy.
checks.detail: .vercel/project.json is not present; deployment can still be configured from Vercel Git integration or CI secrets.
checks.label: Vercel project binding

checks.action: Set Vercel credential values only in local shell, CI secrets, or Vercel project settings.
checks.detail: Current shell is missing deployment values for VERCEL_TOKEN, VERCEL_ORG_ID, VERCEL_PROJECT_ID.
checks.label: Deployment secret availability

commands.label: Export web PWA
commands.purpose: Build the static web output into dist.

commands.label: Validate PWA output
commands.purpose: Verify manifest, service worker, static assets, and no-backend path.

commands.label: Pull Vercel project settings
commands.purpose: Bind local configuration to the selected Vercel project without committing secret values.

commands.label: Build prebuilt Vercel artifact
commands.purpose: Build Vercel output from the static project configuration.

commands.label: Deploy prebuilt production artifact
commands.purpose: Deploy the prebuilt static PWA to production.

commands.label: Smoke deployed PWA
commands.purpose: Verify the deployed URL renders the installable PWA and app workflows.

summary.nextAction: Connect the Vercel project and deployment secrets, then run the prebuilt deploy commands and post-deploy smoke.
